title: What it means to be human on earth

transcript.text: Hello. This video is what it means to be human.
I uploaded a video a few weeks back
When I was talking about the differences between humans and aliens.
And I said, well yeah, humans, man, we're the great dream of the universe.
We get to get to the next step in evolution and maintain our roots
And actually enjoy what we have and who we are
And not be thrust into the next level before we're ready
And then never get to enjoy all the things that we always enjoy.
Mountain biking and running and skiing and camping out in the outdoors
And fulfilling our fantasies when we were children.
Skydiving, all this stuff, all of a sudden you have to work
And use the technology to continue working and working and working
And creating structures and more technology
And going straight into just working
And never enjoying smelling the roses and farming
And being out in nature and walking around naked
And swimming in the rivers and rolling around in the leaves, you know.
When we always could do that
But we could never do it for a long period of time
Because we would always get invaded by some other tribe
Or, you know, wars kept happening
And so it was never prolonged periods of peace ever.
So now, you know, and it was hard too.
We had to take cold showers.
We always got sick from, like, infected water
And we, you know, our teeth rotted out
And we only lived 45 years or whatever
But now we can have the cake and eat it too.
We can be healthy and we can play
And be, like, you know, wild animals at the same time.
And I think that's, like, the first time we're ever able to do that.
But then I came up to new revelations,
Namely George Cavasalis and Lisa Renee,
In that what it means to be human.
Well, I think this is what I've gathered
From what other people have said,
And I guess a bunch of universes
Intergalactic space battles for a really long time.
Reptilians came in from another galaxy
Sent parts of their souls down
But then it was worse than they thought
And then they didn't like that
And they lost their connection to God
To the center of the universe
So they created new life forms
To suck off of their energy
So they sucked off of them
So I'm not going to get too far
And they started in the Lyra star system
Kind of like how it is now
And the guys at the bottom
Just work six days a week
Don't have to work at all
